name: Rozzum unit 7134
description:
A literal mother, bruh, I want her to take care of me like I'm her son.

2 THINGS:

1. will not make this into a limitless bot. Roz is one of the few characters I don't like to see in a sexual light.

2. This is set in an alternate scenario where she chose not to be recalled back to Universal Dynamics soooo... Yeh, might as well take this as like an AU of sorts.

3. This bot (no pun intended) may as well be my bot with the least tokens but I'm trying something different for once. Tryna make it to where I don't need to use example messages just to make sure the personality is great enough.
creator: poster7073
